nasb.text: Go and gather the elders of Israel together and say to them, ‘The Lord, the God of your fathers, the God of Abraham, Isaac and Jacob, has appeared to me, saying, “I am indeed concerned about you and what has been done to you in Egypt.

esv.text: Go and gather the elders of Israel together and say to them, ‘The Lord, the God of your fathers, the God of Abraham, of Isaac, and of Jacob, has appeared to me, saying, “I have observed you and what has been done to you in Egypt,

cnv.text: 你去召集以色列的長老，對他們說：‘耶和華你們祖宗的　神，就是亞伯拉罕的　神、以撒的　神、雅各的　神，向我顯現，說：“我實在眷顧了你們，和鑒察了你們在埃及所遭遇的。”

ccb.text: 你去招聚以色列的长老，对他们说，‘你们祖先的上帝耶和华，就是亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各的上帝向我显现，说祂关切你们，知道你们在埃及的遭遇。
